sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 24:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 24:1
items.html: Because everything that is considered MA was broken in the breaking of the vessels, and only its phase of first Hey remained, which is attributed to BON. (Inner Observation, Item 8)
